nquishing foes,
adept in poetry and fine arts, king's favourite and happy with
wife and children. (10) Enduring hardships, happy, destroyer
of enemies, possessing wind and phlegm in the constitution,
wedded to a bad wife and having a despicable family. (11)
Gets agitated, knows politics, suffers from diseases, runs after
women, spoils his own vows, behaves meanly and does little
work. (12) Learned, supporter of family, getting wealth from
the king and agriculture, prominent and charming in appear-
ance. He may establish a water-shed or sink wells for the
benefit of the public. Best results can be expected in the Dasa
of Venus when he occupies his exaltation identical with the
10th, 11 th or J2th house without the aspect of or conjunction
with malefics.
Saturn brings about the following effects during his period :
Severe afflictions to one's wife and children through rheuma-
tism and such other wind diseases, loss of crops, improper
